name: I Want to Live an Easy Life
overview: The story follows four bold and outspoken women in their 30s who dream of wealth without wanting to work hard, enjoy solitude but dislike loneliness, and long to live freely yet can’t quite bring themselves to do so.

trailers.title: 대충 살고 싶지만 대충 살지 못하는 그녀들의 이야기! 《대충 살고 싶습니다》 티저  by 모비딕 Mobidic
